case_title: REISS-KONCAR SUZANNA et al VS RIVAS FLOR DE MARIA et al

docket_entries.description: INVALID SERVICE AS TO FLOR DE MARIA RIVAS & ALL WORLD TRAVEL SERVICE, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT RIVAS FLOR DE MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT REISS-KONCAR SUZANNA REISS ANN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
